subject_information.address: 49331 Lewis Views Apt. 516, Lake Maryshire, DE 59549

suspicious_activity.narrative: Jacqueline Rodriguez, DOB 2001-02-01, residing at 49331 Lewis Views Apt. 516, Lake Maryshire, DE, engaged in suspicious activity from 2025-02-05 to 2025-08-01. A $76,517.25 incoming wire on 2025-07-29 was followed by outgoing wires totaling $49,517.51 on 2025-07-30 and 2025-07-31 from accounts CUST_0111_ACC_1 and CUST_0111_ACC_2. These transactions are inconsistent with her occupation as a conservation officer. The rapid movement and large volume of funds suggest money laundering. Filed under 31 CFR 1020.320 and 12 CFR 21.11 due to high-risk rating and transaction patterns.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: STEP 1: High-risk rating, high volume of transactions, large incoming wire followed by multiple large outgoing wires. STEP 2: Rapid movement of funds, large transactions inconsistent with occupation. STEP 3: BSA/AML regulations suggest SAR filing. STEP 4: High confidence due to volume and nature of transactions. STEP 5: Money laundering due to layering of funds.
